nasb.text: ‘If anyone kills a person, the murderer shall be put to death at the evidence of witnesses, but no person shall be put to death on the testimony of one witness.

esv.text: “If anyone kills a person, the murderer shall be put to death on the evidence of witnesses. But no person shall be put to death on the testimony of one witness.

cnv.text: 殺人的，要憑著幾個見證人的口供，才可以把他處死；如果只有一個見證人，就不能指證把人處死。

ccb.text: “‘倘若有人被控谋杀，必须有几个人作证才可以处死他，不可凭一个人的证词处死他。
